service.description: Generic file reconciliation that stages uploads and routes through either the RuleSet compare-scope pipeline or the legacy mapping bridge during the RuleSet cutover.

parameter.name: file1
parameter.description: First file to compare (CSV or JSON)

parameter.name: file2
parameter.description: Second file to compare (CSV or JSON)

parameter.name: file1Name
parameter.description: Optional file name override used when the caller provides text payload instead of FileItem.

parameter.name: file1Text
parameter.description: Optional UTF-8 file text payload for remote facade callers that cannot send FileItem uploads.

parameter.name: file2Name
parameter.description: Optional file name override used when the caller provides text payload instead of FileItem.

parameter.name: file2Text
parameter.description: Optional UTF-8 file text payload for remote facade callers that cannot send FileItem uploads.

parameter.name: ruleSetId
parameter.description: Preferred RuleSet input for the Generic backend cutover. When present, Generic routing uses the RuleSet compare-scope pipeline.

parameter.name: compareScopeId
parameter.description: Optional compare-scope override. Required only when the RuleSet exposes more than one compare scope.

parameter.name: file1SystemEnumId
parameter.description: Optional file 1 system identifier. In RuleSet mode this is used only for file-side validation; in mapping mode it remains required.

parameter.name: file2SystemEnumId
parameter.description: Optional file 2 system identifier. In RuleSet mode this is used only for file-side validation; in mapping mode it remains required.

parameter.name: reconciliationMappingId
parameter.description: Legacy mapping bridge input. Still supported temporarily when RuleSet inputs are not yet provided.

parameter.name: reconciliationRunResultId
parameter.description: Optional caller-created run result manifest ID to update after reconciliation completes.

parameter.name: hasHeader
parameter.description: Whether CSV files have headers

parameter.name: file1Type
parameter.description: Detected file type: CSV or JSON

parameter.name: file2Type
parameter.description: Detected file type: CSV or JSON

parameter.name: reconciliationType
parameter.description: Type of reconciliation performed: CSV, JSON, or MIXED

parameter.name: diffLocation
parameter.description: Location of generated diff file

parameter.name: diffFileName
parameter.description: Data-manager relative path of generated diff file

parameter.name: reconciliationRunResultId
parameter.description: Persisted reconciliation run result manifest ID for generated artifacts.

parameter.name: differenceCount
parameter.description: Total number of differences found

parameter.name: onlyInFile1Count
parameter.description: Count of IDs only in file 1

parameter.name: onlyInFile2Count
parameter.description: Count of IDs only in file 2

service.description: Delete one generated reconciliation output file from data-manager or the legacy generic output directory.

parameter.name: filename
parameter.description: Safe generated-output filename or data-manager relative path to delete.

parameter.name: outputLocation
parameter.description: Deprecated; generated output deletion resolves the current data-manager path first.

service.description: Purge generated reconciliation result files older than the configured retention period.

parameter.name: retentionDays
parameter.description: Delete files whose last-modified timestamp is retentionDays or older.

parameter.name: outputLocation
parameter.description: Optional output directory override. Defaults to data-manager reconciliation run results.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireSuperAdmin(ec, 'Only super-admin users may purge reconciliation outputs.')
